description_long: This apple is round and plump, with a smooth skin that transitions from a pale yellow-green to a soft pinkish-red blush. The surface is mostly unblemished, with subtle speckles and a natural sheen that suggests freshness. A short, slightly curved brown stem protrudes from the top, adding to its realistic appearance. The coloration is uneven, with one side more red and the other more yellow, typical of apples exposed to sunlight on one side. The apple's skin appears taut and firm, with no visible cuts or bruises. Its overall size and shape are consistent with a medium to large eating apple, likely of a sweet variety.
description: A round, smooth apple with a pink-red and yellow-green gradient, featuring a short brown stem and a fresh, unblemished surface.
description_view_0: Mostly pink-red with some yellow-green, stem visible at top.
description_view_1: Balanced pink-red and yellow-green, stem centered and upright.
description_view_2: Predominantly yellow-green side, less red visible, stem angled.
description_view_3: Mostly yellow-green with faint red blush, stem at top.
